name_en: Shipped out🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL Chanel Saltzburg Backpack 🎒 Denim Blue Dark Tone is so beautiful, Jisoo style, love the Saltzburg series, stylish with details, very special and good-looking style, very light weight, hardware is matte vintage, bag body also has vintage effect, very NEW!
